goals.title: Guardrails and baseline
goals.objective: Confirm old Codex goal is clear, archive previous 19/19 Ultragoal artifacts, record 75-case baseline and no-fake/timeout/summary guardrails for this run.
goals.evidence: Old Codex goal was clear (get_goal null before create); previous 19/19 Ultragoal artifacts archived under docs/ltp-score-improvement-2026-05-24/ultragoal-archive-before-new-run; new context/brief created with 75-case baseline, read02 TCONF transparency, timeout-as-fail and ltp_summary gate guardrails.

goals.title: Team launch and lane assignment
goals.objective: Start OMX Team with discovery, stats/report, proc/session/wait, time/signal, fs/metadata, and verification/review lanes; workers report evidence only and do not mutate .omx/ultragoal.
goals.evidence: Team launched as continue-ltp-stable-s-8231c807; lane dispatch/status artifacts saved; leftover worker eval processes killed under leader control; workers did not checkpoint Ultragoal.

goals.title: Candidate discovery and first batch
goals.objective: Enumerate 30-50 available next LTP cases from sdcard/docs/current stable list, rank low-risk candidates, and select an 8-16 case targeted batch.
goals.evidence: Discovery produced candidate matrices and first targeted batch recommendations under docs/ltp-score-improvement-2026-05-24/; selected low-risk process/cred/scheduler and signal/time batches for targeted validation.

goals.title: Targeted validation matrix
goals.objective: Run targeted candidate validation on LA and RV before promotion and save raw logs plus ltp_summary matrix with LA/RV x musl/glibc, TFAIL/TBROK/TCONF, timeout, ENOSYS, panic/trap.
goals.evidence: Targeted batch summaries and targeted-promotion11 matrix saved; RV batch evidence identified clean candidates and blockers, LA/RV promotion11 proved 10 clean candidates and blocked sched_getscheduler02.

goals.title: Real ABI fixes only
goals.objective: For failing targeted cases, implement only real low-risk ABI/errno/time/signal/fs/process fixes with no hardcoded case-name success and rerun affected targeted cases.
goals.evidence: Integrated only real ABI/tooling changes: signal pending/sigsuspend/sysinfo support from workers, numeric-status summary hardening, generated pyc deletion; no fake PASS/case hardcode/silent skip added.

goals.title: Promote clean stable additions
goals.objective: Promote only cases with fresh LA/RV x musl/glibc evidence, preserving read02 TCONF transparency and excluding true blockers with reasons.
goals.evidence: Promoted exactly 10 clean cases into LTP_STABLE_CASES: getresuid01,getresuid02,getresuid03,getresgid01,getresgid02,getresgid03,getsid01,rt_sigaction02,sched_getscheduler01,uname04; sched_getscheduler02 left blocked due LA musl TFAIL.

goals.title: Promoted stable targeted gates
goals.objective: Run LA/RV targeted stable gates after promotion and verify PASS/FAIL, internal signals, timeout, ENOSYS, panic/trap via scripts/ltp_summary.py.
goals.evidence: Stable85 targeted gates passed for LA and RV: each ltp-musl 85/0 and ltp-glibc 85/0; internal only known read02 TCONF=4 total per arch; timeout/ENOSYS/panic 0.

goals.title: Final full evaluator gate
goals.objective: Run cargo fmt check, full LA/RV run-eval gates, and required ltp_summary commands; do not substitute exit code alone for summary evidence.

goals.title: Final cleanup review quality gate
goals.objective: Run changed-file anti-slop, rerun verification if it edits, run code-review, write final report and quality-gate JSON, sync remote if applicable, then complete Ultragoal.

plan.codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
